meta.name: description
meta.content: Legal terms, intellectual-property notice and development-stage disclaimer for Fromentin Industries.

div.p: Fromentin Industries is a private development-stage Canadian technology and systems initiative. This website is presented for information, learning, documentation and brand development.
By continuing, you acknowledge the Development-Stage Notice, Privacy Policy and Legal Terms. This website is not a source of professional engineering, legal, defence, financial or investment advice.

input.span: I have read and accept the site terms, privacy notice and legal disclosure.

div.p: If you do not agree, close this page or return to the referring site.
These terms define the public use, intellectual-property position and development-stage boundaries for the Fromentin Industries website.

article.p: Fromentin Industries is presented as a private development-stage initiative. Website content is informational and should not be relied on as professional engineering, legal, defence, financial or investment advice.
The Fromentin Industries name, wording, brand presentation, layout, visual identity, documentation concepts and site structure are intended for protected brand use unless otherwise stated.
Copying, mirroring, scraping, impersonating, misleading reuse, commercial reuse or unauthorized redistribution of this website’s content or branding is not permitted.
The website is provided as-is. Fromentin Industries does not guarantee uninterrupted availability, technical accuracy, suitability or completeness.

div.p: Private development-stage initiative exploring Canadian systems, engineering and infrastructure concepts.
